name: Alphabet Class C
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $367.1987. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $364.8876 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $367.1987, stop $340.1937, target $369.6920. Risk/reward is 0.09:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
